task: Add short-flag alias support to argsy's parse(): accept an options object as a second parameter, parse(argv, { aliases }), where aliases maps single-letter names to long flag names (e.g. { v: "verbose" }). An aliased argument like -v must then behave exactly like --verbose, including the value form -n ada. Single-dash arguments that are not in aliases keep their current behavior (treated as positionals), and calls without the options object are unchanged. Add test coverage.
